name: task-breakdown
description: Break a complex goal or project into actionable steps with effort estimates. Use when the user asks to plan a task, break something down, create a roadmap, figure out steps to accomplish a goal, or needs help scoping work.
author: pantheon

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: The goal or task to break down

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: How fine-grained: high-level, standard, or detailed
